text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash, Tosen Jordan, and I have come to a
karaoke booth to practice dancing.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I take a half-step back with my left leg here, hold
six counts, then switch legs...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Next, I twist my torso, turn 270 degrees, and
strike a pose...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Omigosh, Flash! You gotta take a chill pill. You're, like, waaay overthinking this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The goal for today is to get Eishin Flash to loosen
up her dance moves. Tosen Jordan is here to help.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Okay, so when it comes to dancing, the most
important thing is to go with the flow and feel the
vibes.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The flow and vibes, you say? Hmm... I don't doubt
your words, but I'm not sure I comprehend—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Don't sweat it. Just move your body to the music,
and you'll eventually find your groove.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Is that how it works? Very well. First, I'll have to
choose a song...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Is that how it works? Very well. First, I'll have to
choose a song...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ooh, nice idea! If you pick a song without choreography, you'll have no choice but to go with the flow!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I see... You make a valid point.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Well, here I go... Practice makes perfect!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Dootie-do-doo. ♪ Dootie-doo... ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh! Lookin' good! Your moves are fire! ♪

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, but the B melody makes a peculiar
change from this part... Hm-hm-hmm... ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Nah, you're nailing it! I kinda wanna dance too
now!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Laaa-da-dee-dee! ♪ Daadaa! ♪ Woohoo! ♪
You're doing awesome! ♪

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Dootie-doo-dah... ♪ Do-do-do, deeda,
dootie-do-doo... ♪ And now, the hook!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Dootie-do-doo! ♪ Dootie-doo! ♪ Doo-da-daa,
dootie-do-doo... ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Nice! Now you've got it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I see... So this is what is called "flow"!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hehe! You should join us too, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of us dance together for some time,
and Eishin Flash loses the stiffness in her dancing
that she's always struggled with.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
A demonstration? Oh, you mean me. Well, my
dancing's nothing to write home about, but...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Sure, why not? Lemme show you some
moves!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Another race at haaand! ♪ A chance to claim my
true glory! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Take aim for victory and let's challenge! ♪ I make
my mad dash towards the goal! ♪

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Strange. I can tell she is singing with her whole
heart just by watching, but more importantly...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I can tell she is genuinely enjoying herself. It
makes me want to join in...
choice_data_list: What's holding you back? Go ahead!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I don't know if I'll be any good at it,
but I'll attempt to go with this "flow."

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Who cares if it's good or not? All that matters is if
you have fun! ♪ I wing my dances all the time. ♪

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Go on, make the track your own! ♪ As you
traverse that winding roooad! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: That's the spirit! Now relax and roll with it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash eventually begins to relax and
manages to overcome the issues she was having
with dancing!
